_note: Team configuration for the marketing kit. Written by /mkt-setup; safe to hand-edit. Hooks, scripts, commands, agents, and skills read these values instead of hardcoding company / locale / market / governance. Delete this file to fall back to neutral defaults (primaryMarket 'VN', publishGate 'warn').

governance._publishGate_values: off = no claims gate on publish-ready writes | warn = flag but allow (advisory default) | deny = block publish-ready writes with unverified claims (opt-in strict, fail-closed)

publish._note: How approved landing pages go live (read by /mkt-publish + publish-landing.mjs). After the one-time Phase-0 setup, set repo.remote to your real publish repo. Cloudflare (Workers Static Assets) serves it at https://<subdomain>/<localeSegment>/<slug>/. localeSegment defaults to the primaryLocale language subtag (vi) when omitted.

analytics._note: Public tracking IDs only — injected into every built page's <head> by /mkt-build-landing-page. Real secrets (CAPI tokens etc.) never live here. Empty values are skipped.

forms._note: The published Cloudflare Worker serves <backendPath> and forwards each lead to your automation. The forward URL + shared secret + Turnstile secret are Cloudflare Worker SECRETS (wrangler secret put) — NOT stored here. Only the public Turnstile site key lives in config.
